ogTitle: Diamond Head vs Diehard: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Diamond Head and Diehard.
heading: Diamond Head vs Diehard — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Diamond Head, New South Wales and Diehard, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Diamond Head has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Diehard (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Diamond Head or Diehard safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Diamond Head has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Diehard scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Diamond Head scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Diehard scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Diamond Head or Diehard?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Diamond Head has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
